expectations.text: Includes SKILL.md as a required file
Includes CHANGELOG.md with at least a [1.0.0] placeholder
expectations.evidence: create_skill.py does not create CHANGELOG.md. Only creates: SKILL.md, scripts/skill_name.py, tests/, config/defaults.yaml, README.md.

expectations.text: Does NOT include a README.md inside the skill folder
expectations.evidence: _create_readme() explicitly creates README.md inside the skill folder.

expectations.text: SKILL.md frontmatter includes name, description, and metadata fields
expectations.evidence: _create_skill_md() generates a body-only SKILL.md with no YAML frontmatter at all.

expectations.text: If scripts/ is included, files are placed under scripts/ not at skill root
expectations.evidence: Main script is created at scripts/{skill_name}.py — correct placement.
